summary: OrganizerDashboard refactoring regression testing completed. Found and fixed 2 critical bugs: (1) BoutiqueSection missing from import causing app crash, (2) BookingsSection missing SectionHeader/back button. All 16 sub-components now working correctly. Hub displays 19 events, 3 participants, 100€ revenue.

issues: Recharts console warnings about width/height being -1 - non-critical, charts still render when visible

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: BoutiqueSection not imported - caused ReferenceError crash when clicking Boutique hub card
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added BoutiqueSection to import statement at line 32-37

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: BookingsSection missing SectionHeader - no back button to return to hub
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added SectionHeader component with onBack prop before BookingsSection

passed_tests: Hub Section - Stats display (19 events, 3 participants, 100€ revenue)
Hub Section - All 17 hub cards rendered with correct icons and descriptions
Events Section - Navigation works, back button visible, events list displayed with publish/depublish/edit/delete buttons
Participants Section - Navigation works, filter by event, search, table with 2 participants displayed
Gauges Section - Navigation works, real-time fill rates displayed for all events
Check-in Section - Navigation works, participant list with dossard, t-shirt size, status (EN ATTENTE/RÉCUPÉRÉ)
Finances Section - Navigation works, total revenus (100€), CSV/PDF export buttons visible
Correspondances Section - Navigation works, NOUVEAU MESSAGE button, historique des envois
Share Section - Navigation works, event URLs with Facebook/Twitter/email share buttons
Chronometrage Section - Navigation works, event selector dropdown displayed
Results Section - Navigation works, events list with 'Voir resultats' and 'Export' buttons
Partners Section - Navigation works, 2 partners displayed (ChronoPlus Lyon, Le Kiosque du Sport), add/edit/delete buttons
Sponsors Section - Navigation works, 4 sponsors/donateurs with stats cards, payment link generation
Bookings Section - Navigation works (FIXED), back button now visible, 1 booking displayed (Decathlon Lyon)
Boutique Section - Navigation works (FIXED), products catalog with Native Spirit items, tabs for catalogue/prestataire/commandes/messagerie
Create Event Dialog - Opens correctly, multi-step form (4 steps), sport type selector, date picker, location input
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts warnings about chart dimensions - could be improved by adding minHeight to chart containers in HubSection.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: OrganizerDashboard refactoring fully tested. Two bugs found and fixed: (1) BoutiqueSection import missing, (2) BookingsSection missing SectionHeader. All 16 sub-components (HubSection, EventsSection, ParticipantsSection, GaugesSection, CheckinSection, FinancesSection, CorrespondancesSection, ShareSection, ChronometrageSection, ResultsSection, PartnersSection, SponsorsSection, BookingsSection, BoutiqueSection + OrganizerSmsSection + OrganizerAnalyticsSection) now working. Create Event Dialog multi-step form working. Navigation to all sections and back to hub confirmed working.

sections_tested.hub: PASS - Stats and charts display correctly
sections_tested.checkin: PASS - QR scan and kit validation
